data.title: Bernstein: Strategy's balance sheet will increase by $12.75 billion after adopting new accounting standards
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Research and brokerage firm Bernstein analysts released a report saying that Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) will increase its balance sheet by $12.75 billion after adopting the new fair value accounting rules of FASB. Previously, the value of digital assets on the books of enterprises had to be recorded as impairment losses when prices fell, but if prices rose, they could not be adjusted upward unless they were sold. However, starting in January 2025, Strategy adopted the new fair value accounting rules of the Financial Accounting Standards Board (FASB), which will result in a one-time cumulative adjustment of $12.75 billion to the beginning retained earnings. Bernstein analyst Gautam Chhugani said in a report to clients on Thursday that the change will enable the company to recognize unrealized gains on its Bitcoin positions for the first time.
Under the new FASB rules and the provisions of the 2022 Inflation Reduction Act, there is still uncertainty about the tax treatment of Bitcoin held by Strategy, meaning it may require a special exemption from the IRS. (The Block)

data.title: Record $1.6 Billion Bitcoin Exodus from Exchanges Signals Bullish Institutional Activity
data.description: In a significant display of bullish sentiment, over 17,000 bitcoins, valued at more than $1.6 billion, were withdrawn from centralized exchanges on Wednesday, marking the largest single-day exodus since April 2024. According to Andrew Dragosch, Head of Research at Bitwise, this massive outflow, prominently noted in Glassnode's latest data, suggests substantial institutional purchases and a strategic accumulation by large-scale investors.Coinbase, one of the leading cryptocurrency exchanges, registered a staggering net outflow of over 15,000 BTC. This move is interpreted by analysts at Timechainindex.com as indicative of major institutional activity, possibly involving players like ETFs or MicroStrategy, which are known for their substantial Bitcoin investments.Further analysis by CryptoQuant highlighted an overall negative net flow of 47K BTC across all exchanges on the same day, with Coinbase accounting for 15.8K of this total. This trend underscores the growing preference among investors to hold Bitcoin for the long term, taking direct custody of their assets away from the exchanges.The timing of these withdrawals coincides with a brief dip in Bitcoin prices to below $96,800 during late U.S. trading hours on Wednesday. However, prices rebounded sharply early Thursday following public encouragement from Eric Trump for World Liberty Financial, a crypto platform linked to the Trump family, to make its inaugural Bitcoin investment. This event further fueled the optimistic market outlook, reinforcing the bullish momentum behind Bitcoin as it continues to attract both institutional and high-net-worth investors, according to CoinDesk.

data.title: Somnia Blockchain and Web3 Game Publisher Uprising Labs Launch $10 Million Accelerator Program
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Somnia Blockchain announced a strategic partnership with Web3 game publisher Uprising Labs and launched a $10 million Somnia-Uprising accelerator program to provide game studios with the resources, guidance and financial support needed to develop and expand Web3 games. In addition, the two parties also cooperated to launch the community-driven program "Club" to help Web3 game participants connect with industry peers, get first access to new projects, and obtain exclusive whitelist opportunities and airdrops.

data.title: Solana Network Achieves Historic Milestone with One Year of Uninterrupted Operation
data.description: Solana has reached a significant milestone in its journey towards establishing itself as a reliable and robust blockchain network. According to a recent update from SolanaFloor, the network has successfully operated without any disruptions for a full year, setting a record for the longest period of stable operation in its history.

data.title: USDD 2.0 circulation exceeds 100 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the USDD official website, USDD 2.0's circulation officially exceeded 100 million just 12 days after its launch. As a safe, transparent and stable decentralized stablecoin, USDD 2.0 maintains a 1:1 anchor relationship with the US dollar with its unique security liquidation mechanism, dynamic adjustment strategy of collateral assets and risk management system.
It is reported that USDD 2.0 has achieved over-collateralization and community-led governance. This innovative model creates a transparent and auditable system for users, ensuring that users can fully control their assets, providing investors with a more reliable and robust choice. Recently, USDD also launched a 20% annualized return pledge activity through JustLend DAO.

data.title: Canada bans crypto funds from qualifying for reduced margin requirements
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cointelegraph published an article on X platform to moisturize that Canada prohibits crypto funds from enjoying the qualification of reduced margin requirements on the grounds that their volatility and liquidity risks will lead to higher leveraged trading costs.

data.title: Analysis: Every $1 billion in Bitcoin Strategic Reserve purchases could trigger an incremental $20 billion in market value
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Katalin Tischhauser, head of investment research at Sygnum, predicted and analyzed that if the United States establishes a strategic Bitcoin reserve, every $1 billion in funds entering may trigger a multiplier effect - significantly expanding the market value of Bitcoin. Tischhauser explained that every additional $1 billion in inflows could increase Bitcoin’s market cap by $20 billion — a phenomenon associated not only with a direct inflow of capital, but also with a significant upward price shock. “Every $1 billion of strategic reserve purchases could have a 20x multiplier effect on Bitcoin’s market cap,” Tischhauser said.
She noted that the additional $19 billion multiplier effect would come from the resulting demand shock and pressure from Bitcoin’s own limited liquidity. Limited liquidity can drive exponential growth.
Tischhauser said the effect is also exacerbated by the scarcity of Bitcoin’s own liquidity. “The potential demand shock would be very significant because the liquid supply of Bitcoin is very small,” she explained. Her comments suggest that limited supply forces prices to rise quickly as new money comes in. Once early capital inflows are absorbed, price pressure will become more intense and subsequent demand will face a tighter supply of Bitcoin. Tischhauser illustrates this dynamic by breaking down the effect: the first two $1 billion inflows will primarily “consume” available demand, while the third and fourth $1 billion inflows will encounter a tighter supply environment, causing prices to accelerate. (The Block)

data.title: Despite Federal Reserve Rate Cuts, U.S. Treasury Yields Continue to Climb, Posing Risks to Stock Market
data.description: In a recent analysis by a capital market strategist at T.Rowe Price, an unsettling trend has been highlighted: US Treasury yields continue to rise, despite the Federal Reserve's efforts to cut interest rates. This pattern poses potential risks to the financial markets, particularly the stock market, which has already been experiencing the strain of higher interest rates.The report notes that while the 10-year US Treasury yield has slightly fallen from its recent highs, the general direction of yields remains upward. This ongoing increase in yields is alarming because it suggests that investor concerns about inflation or other economic pressures might outweigh the Fed's attempts to ease monetary conditions.Additionally, the relationship between the US bond market and the stock market has grown tighter since mid-December of the previous year, indicating that movements in Treasury yields are having a more pronounced impact on stock prices. This heightened correlation underscores the broader implications of rising yields — not only do they affect the cost of borrowing for the government, but they also influence equity investment decisions and valuations.

data.title: Pudgy Penguins CEO Discusses Ethereum Foundation Controversy
data.description:
According to Odaily, in a recent interview, Pudgy Penguins CEO Luca Netz addressed the controversy surrounding the Ethereum Foundation and whether there had been any private interactions. Netz stated that the Ethereum Foundation has never communicated with him, despite his willingness to engage with them. He highlighted Pudgy Penguins' achievements within the Ethereum ecosystem over the past few years, considering it one of the best projects in the ecosystem. However, he noted that there had been no contact from the Ethereum Foundation.

In contrast, Netz mentioned that after entering the Solana ecosystem, he found it easy to communicate with Solana co-founders Toly and Raj whenever he wished. He concluded that Ethereum's mission and vision seem to be more aligned with being a network nation rather than solely supporting and interacting with builders. Netz suggested that perhaps Ethereum's mission takes precedence over everything else.

data.title: DeepSeek Achieves 20 Million Daily Active Users Within 20 Days
data.description: According to PANews, recent data reveals that DeepSeek has surpassed 20 million daily active users just 20 days after its launch. On February 5, two companies, Deepseek Limited and DEEPSEEK (HK) LIMITED, were established in Hong Kong as private limited companies, as shown by the Qichacha app. Notably, DeepSeek, also known as Hangzhou DeepSeek Artificial Intelligence Basic Technology Research Co., Ltd., has successfully registered several trademarks under the DeepSeek name. These trademarks cover international classifications such as social law, design research, and scientific instruments.
